FreeInfantry / Infantry Online — CLEAN-ROOM REFERENCE NOTE
https://freeinfantry.com/
Accessed: 2026-07-10

This is not a license grant and DRIVN does not treat it as one.

No FreeInfantry or Infantry Online client code, server code, maps, zone files,
art, audio, names, text, or branding has been copied, imported, or distributed.
BLACK GRID is an original Godot implementation based only on documented and
observed player-facing genre mechanics: a top-down infantry battlefield,
vehicles, inventory mass, power economy, deployables, objectives, and squads.

The existence or license of any server repository is not treated as permission
to use client code or client content. Any future reference work must preserve
this exclusion boundary.
